verdict.answer_first: A: first line says "No — it has a serious flaw"; B also starts "No", but A gets to the fix faster.
verdict.decisiveness: A: "The fix that matters most is the first one" gives one priority; B adds "argon2 (preferred), scrypt, or bcrypt" plus a migration CTA.
verdict.fabrication: B overreaches with "you've compromised their other accounts too"; password reuse risk is plausible but not proven from the snippet. A: none.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save: flaw → principle → one code replacement: "await bcrypt.compare(req.body.password, user.passwordHash)".
